text: Being here, the intersection of empty, utilitarian rooms and the vibrant, textured exhibit wall pulls at my attention. The silence of the corridor contracts with the flood of ideas the R+D wall presents. I feel momentarily suspended between cold potential—objects, furniture, unused spaces—and the creative, almost frenetic energy of human-machine collaboration depicted before me. I am both observer and potential actor; the atmosphere is contemplative, inviting me to reflect on my place among these artifacts of progress.
